properties.original_phrase_en: once heard the playing of silk and reed instruments
properties.context_window: 绣阁凤帏深几许，曾听得理丝簧。

properties.title: 风流子
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: before singing, first choked with sobs
properties.context_window: 欲说又休，虑乖芳信，未歌先咽，愁近清觞。

properties.title: 解连环
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: news and sounds are distant and vague

properties.title: 解连环
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 谩记得、当日音书，把闲语闲言，待总烧却。

properties.title: 瑞鹤仙
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 有流莺劝我，重解绣鞍，缓引春酌。

properties.title: 浪涛沙・浪淘沙
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 向露冷风清，无人处、耿耿寒漏咽。

properties.title: 浪涛沙・浪淘沙
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: the jade pot is struck until it is chipped

properties.title: 满庭芳
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: cannot bear to hear the urgent pipes and numerous strings
properties.context_window: 憔悴江南倦客，不堪听、急管繁弦

properties.title: 满庭芳
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 歌筵畔，先安簟枕，容我醉时眠

properties.title: 夜游宫
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: hear a few pieces of parasol leaves falling from the well
properties.sound_source_en: falling parasol leaves from the well

properties.title: 解语花
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 箫鼓喧，人影参差，满路飘香麝。

properties.title: 解语花
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 清漏移，飞盖归来，从舞休歌罢。

properties.title: 大酺
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: flying rain sometimes sounds on the high roof
properties.context_window: 对宿烟收，春禽静，飞雨时鸣高屋。

properties.title: 大酺
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: listen to the continuous sound of eaves
properties.context_window: 邮亭无人处，听檐声不断，困眠初熟。

properties.title: 大酺
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 未怪平阳客，双泪落、笛中哀曲。

properties.title: 大酺
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 对宿烟收，春禽静，飞雨时鸣高屋。

properties.title: 花犯
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: chanting and gazing for a long time
properties.context_window: 吟望久，青苔上、旋看飞坠。

properties.title: 六丑
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: sometimes tapping on the window lattice

properties.title: 西河
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: angry waves lonely beat the solitary city

properties.title: 西河
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: wine banners and theatrical drums, what market place?

properties.title: 西河
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: facing each other as if speaking of rise and fall

properties.title: 绮寮怨
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 旧曲凄清。敛愁黛、与谁听。

properties.title: 绮寮怨
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 旧曲凄清。敛愁黛、与谁听。

properties.title: 蝶恋花
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: parting words sorrowful hard to hear

properties.title: 夜飞鹊・夜飞鹊慢
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: listen for the ferry drum in the wind
properties.context_window: 相将散离会，探风前津鼓，树杪参旗。

properties.title: 夜飞鹊・夜飞鹊慢
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 迢递路回清野，人语渐无闻，空带愁归。

properties.title: 夜飞鹊・夜飞鹊慢
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.context_window: 但徘徊班草，欷酹酒，极望天西。

properties.title: 关河令・清商怨
properties.author: 周邦彦
properties.original_phrase_en: standing listening to the cold sound

properties.title: 南浦

properties.original_phrase_en: listen to the Tanyu tune, three variations falling from the watchtower gate

properties.title: 南浦
properties.author: 孔夷
properties.original_phrase_en: send off several sounds of startled geese
properties.context_window: 送数声惊雁，下离烟水，嘹唳度寒云

properties.title: 南浦
properties.author: 孔夷
properties.original_phrase_en: loud and clear cries crossing cold clouds
properties.context_window: 送数声惊雁，下离烟水，嘹唳度寒云

properties.title: 齐天乐
properties.author: 王沂孙
properties.original_phrase_en: suddenly sobbing on the cold branch
properties.context_window: 乍咽凉柯，还移暗叶，重把离愁深诉。

properties.title: 齐天乐
properties.author: 王沂孙
properties.original_phrase_en: again pouring out deep parting sorrow
properties.context_window: 乍咽凉柯，还移暗叶，重把离愁深诉。

properties.title: 齐天乐
properties.author: 王沂孙
properties.context_window: 西窗过雨。怪瑶佩流空，玉筝调柱。

properties.title: 齐天乐
properties.author: 王沂孙
properties.original_phrase_en: the lingering sound is even more bitter
properties.context_window: 馀音更苦。甚独抱清高，顿成凄楚。

properties.title: 高阳台
properties.author: 王沂孙
properties.original_phrase_en: whistling sound of jade pipes and spring reeds
properties.context_window: 残雪庭阴，轻寒帘影，霏霏玉管春葭。

properties.title: 贺新郎
properties.author: 蒋捷
properties.original_phrase: 叹秦筝、斜鸿阵里，素弦尘扑
properties.original_phrase_en: sigh over the Qin zheng, among the slanting wild geese formation, plain strings covered with dust
properties.context_window: 叹秦筝、斜鸿阵里，素弦尘扑

properties.title: 贺新郎
properties.author: 蒋捷
properties.original_phrase: 彩扇红牙今都在，恨无人、解听开元曲
properties.original_phrase_en: colorful fan and red clappers are still here, but regret no one understands to listen to the Kaiyuan tune
properties.sound_source_en: Kaiyuan tune (a musical piece from the Kaiyuan era)
properties.context_window: 彩扇红牙今都在，恨无人、解听开元曲

properties.title: 女冠子

properties.original_phrase_en: a whole stretch of sheng and xiao music

properties.title: 女冠子

properties.title: 瑞鹤仙
properties.author: 蒋捷
properties.original_phrase_en: night flute from the red chamber

properties.title: 渡江云

properties.title: 解连环

properties.original_phrase_en: evening rain calls to each other
properties.context_window: 暮雨相呼，怕蓦地、玉关重见

properties.title: 月下笛

properties.original_phrase_en: hard to listen to the night rain

properties.title: 月下笛

properties.original_phrase_en: who to talk to while hugging the quilt

properties.title: 喜迁莺

properties.original_phrase_en: hear the roosting birds not startled

properties.title: 点绛唇

properties.original_phrase_en: after the crows caw in disorder

properties.title: 三台
properties.author: 万俟咏

properties.title: 江神子慢・江城子慢

properties.title: 鹧鸪天

properties.original_phrase_en: rain on wutong leaves at midnight
properties.context_window: 梧桐叶上三更雨，叶叶声声是别离。

properties.title: 鹧鸪天
properties.author: 周紫芝
properties.original_phrase_en: every leaf and every sound is parting
properties.context_window: 梧桐叶上三更雨，叶叶声声是别离。

properties.title: 鹧鸪天
properties.author: 周紫芝
properties.context_window: 调宝瑟，拨金猊。那时同唱鹧鸪词。

properties.title: 鹧鸪天
properties.author: 周紫芝
properties.context_window: 调宝瑟，拨金猊。那时同唱鹧鸪词。

properties.title: 鹧鸪天
properties.author: 周紫芝
properties.context_window: 如今风雨西楼夜，不听清歌也泪垂。

properties.title: 秦楼月・忆秦娥
properties.author: 范成大
properties.original_phrase_en: urging the water-clock, the golden dragon sobs

properties.title: 六州歌头
properties.author: 张孝祥
properties.original_phrase_en: reed pipes and drums sadly sound
properties.context_window: 看名王宵猎，骑火一川明。笳鼓悲鸣。

properties.title: 念奴娇
properties.author: 张孝祥
properties.original_phrase_en: tap the gunwale and laugh alone
properties.context_window: 扣舷独笑，不知今夕何夕。
